title: Nepal Tour 3 Nights 4 Days
description:
This 4-day journey offers a serene and enriching exploration of Kathmandu’s spiritual heart and cultural treasures. Beginning with a warm welcome in the capital, the tour sets a devotional tone with an evening aarti at the sacred Pashupatinath Temple. Over the next days, travelers uncover the essence of the Kathmandu Valley through visits to revered UNESCO World Heritage Sites, including Swayambhunath Stupa, Boudhanath Stupa, Kathmandu Durbar Square, and the holy Jal Narayan (Sleeping Vishnu) Temple.

The experience is enhanced by a scenic cable car ride to Chandragiri Hills, where panoramic valley views and a visit to Baleshwar Mahadev Temple provide moments of peace and reflection. A cultural visit to Patan Durbar Square showcases the artistic brilliance of Newari civilization. Designed for those seeking spirituality, heritage, and gentle exploration, this tour delivers a meaningful and memorable Kathmandu escape.
highlights: Explore Boudhanath Stupa (UNESCO World Heritage Site)
Sightseeing at Kathmandu Durbar Square and Jal Narayan Temple
Scenic cable car ride to Chandragiri Hills
Explore Patan Durbar Square and Krishna Mandir
Panoramic views of the Kathmandu Valley and Himalayas
inclusions: Assistant Guide in arrival and departure / Hotel
03 Night’s accommodation on double sharing basis
English / Hindi speaking tour guide for sightseeing
01-liter mineral water per day during trip
Arrival and departure transfer and sightseeing by A/C Vehicle
All vehicle parking fees at the attractions.
Vehicles are not to be at disposal and are available as per itinerary only (point to point basis)
exclusions: International airfare and Nepal visa fees
Personal expenses (drinks, laundry, tips, phone calls, souvenirs)
Entrance fees not mentioned in the itinerary
Any service or activity not included in the inclusions
Cable car ride at Chandragiri Hills Ticket

itinerary.title: Arrive in Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Upon Arrival in Kathmandu Airport, you Will be greeted and assisted by our representative after completing your custom formalities, transfer to the hotel for check-in. In evening attend Aarti at Pashupatinath temple later drive back to hotel. Overnight at Kathmandu hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu city Sightseeing
itinerary.description: After breakfast Kathmandu City sightseeing tour, visit Swoyambhunath Stupa (World heritage site), Jala Narayan Temple (Sleeping Vishnu), Kathmandu Durbar Square (Living God Kumari) & Boudhanath Stupa (world Heritage site) Later drive back to hotel. Overnight is at Hotel in Kathmandu.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu – drive to Chandragiri Hills via Cable Car
itinerary.description: After breakfast drive to Chandragiri hill continue take cable car ride (2-3 Hours) darshan of Baleshwar Mahadev Temple afternoon drive to Patan Durbar Square (Krishna Mandir) later drive back to hotel. Overnight is at Hotel in Kathmandu.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Departure transfer
itinerary.description: After breakfast, the morning will be comparatively free and closer to the time of your flight, you will be transferred to the airport to board your flight for onward journey.
